name: creditkarma-mcp
description: Credit Karma transaction tracking for Claude — sync and query your transactions, spending by category and merchant, and account summaries via natural language

ck_cookies.title: Credit Karma CKAT Cookie
ck_cookies.description: Your Credit Karma Cookie header (run `npm run auth` from the repo to capture via browser login, or copy CKAT from DevTools → Application → Cookies)

tools.name: ck_set_session
tools.description: Store a Credit Karma session cookie to enable automatic token refresh

tools.name: ck_sync_transactions
tools.description: Sync Credit Karma transactions into the local SQLite database

tools.name: ck_list_transactions
tools.description: List transactions with optional filters. Paginated.

tools.name: ck_get_recent_transactions
tools.description: Return the N most recent transactions

tools.name: ck_get_spending_by_category
tools.description: Group debit transactions by category and return totals

tools.name: ck_get_spending_by_merchant
tools.description: Return top merchants by total debit spend

tools.name: ck_get_account_summary
tools.description: Return per-account debit, credit, and net totals

tools.name: ck_query_sql
tools.description: Execute a raw SQL SELECT query against the transactions database
